caption: A woman with curly hair tied back is seated in a studio setting, wearing black over-ear headphones and a black t-shirt with a white circular logo on the chest. She is positioned in front of a professional black microphone. To her left, a screen displays the word "Johnson" in red. On the walls behind and beside her, several logos are visible, including "BOSS TALK 101" and a smaller graphic that reads "PODCAST." A yellow vertical stripe accents the wall behind her. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a stationary position, looking slightly to her right with a subtle, neutral expression. Her posture and the placement of the equipment remain consistent across the frames, with only minor, subtle shifts in her facial muscles and gaze as she listens or prepares to speak.
